VIP Memberships

VIP memberships are monthly subscriptions. Each purchase rewards you with Rogue Coins deposited directly to your in-game LuxuVIP wallet — spend them at the in-game VIP store on exclusive items, vehicles, and more.

Rogue Coin Packs

Rogue Coins are the official currency for the in-game Rogue Empire VIP store. Use them to purchase exclusive vehicles, clothing, items and more via the LuxuVIP shop. Coins are delivered to your wallet within 60 seconds of purchase.
Starter Pack
Hustler Pack
